title: Raku Game File (.raku)
description: Schema for .raku game definition files. Full schema documentation is available with SDK access. Contact https://rakuai.com/contact.html to request access.

genre.description: Game genre. See SDK documentation for available genres.

template.description: Template identifier. See SDK documentation for available templates.

ai_disclosure.description: Required for platform compliance. Declares AI usage in the game.
